security.title: Absolute Secure Local Processing
security.subtitle: Your data never leaves your server
security.usp_text: Your data never leaves your server. All computation, vector extraction, and language inference happen entirely offline within your infrastructure.

case_studies.title: Real-world Case Studies
case_studies.retail_desc: Analyzing WinCommerce net profit margin growth in 2023.
case_studies.banking_desc: Evaluating Techcombank's Non-Performing Loan (NPL) and CAR ratio across 4 quarters.
case_studies.tech_desc: Synthesizing Cloud & Software segment revenue for FPT Software.

agent_steps.title: Agent Processing Workflow
agent_steps.step1_desc: Agent analyzes user prompt to determine whether code calculation or data retrieval is required.
agent_steps.step2_desc: Uses local Vector DB to extract the most relevant text chunks from enterprise PDF reports.
agent_steps.step3_desc: Automatically generates Pandas/Python scripts to compute complex metrics like CAGR, ROE, and ROI.
agent_steps.step4_desc: Synthesizes final response backed by strictly accurate document-referenced sources.
